title: The Real World
description: Make Minecraft biomes feel more alive!
body: # The Real World Mod - The aim of this mod is to make biomes feel more alive by adding related particles without compromising Minecraft's look. ![General overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4jws75JG/images/ee8ad4373f6409aef40fc870e1ec5cf041934d68.png) - Some particles are related with the type of plant nearby the player so same biomes might have different particles depending on the plants present. ![flower related](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4jws75JG/images/87ceec8a57ba7183212556bb9a5616517697aebe.png) -Fireflies during the night! ![Fireflies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4jws75JG/images/891b9284352f87e037b0e0ab2723f2c59083df3c.png) **The shader used in the photos is Complementary Shaders - Reimagined, you can [click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-reimagined) to download**
